title: We are Sipremo
tagline: Technology that predicts the future to secure our present.
p1: Sipremo is the world's first complete climate intelligence platform. We integrate short-, medium-, and long-term forecasts in a single solution, enabling strategic decisions across different horizons.
p2: Our technology combines operational experience with advanced climate models, turning complex data into actionable insights.
p3: We help organizations operate with greater safety, efficiency, and predictability amid dynamic climate scenarios.
cap1: Reduced operational losses with short-term forecasts
cap3: Strategic planning and climate risk mitigation
teamSubtitle: An experienced, multidisciplinary team focused on innovation, science, and real impact.

gabriel.name: Gabriel Sávio
gabriel.desc: MIT Under 35 award nominee, UNESCO speaker, Entrepreneur and Featured Innovator at Climate iArea.

bruce.name: Bruce Ford
bruce.desc: 22 years as President of CliDaaS, former U.S. Navy meteorologist and leader in climate and long-range forecasting.

jefferson.name: Jefferson Oliveira
jefferson.desc: Over 20 years with the São Paulo Fire Department and project quality evaluator for the São Paulo government.

renato.name: Renato Paes
renato.desc: Master's in Statistics from UFSCar; has saved over $20 million through implemented projects.

kaushal.name: Kaushal Chokshi
kaushal.desc: Global leader, serial entrepreneur, IPO founder, strategist in technology, sustainability, and innovation.
